title: drosera filiformis var. tracyi
intro: Drosera filiformis var. tracyi, also known as the slender sundew, is a rare and unique carnivorous plant species belonging to the Droseraceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues, such as bloating and gas. The health benefits of Drosera filiformis var. tracyi include its potential to soothe stomach ulcers, reduce inflammation, and promote overall gut health. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or syrup, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal effects.
